2603.18563.title: Reasonably reasoning AI agents can avoid game-theoretic failures in zero-shot, provably
2603.18563.paper_summary: AI agents are increasingly deployed in interactive economic environments characterized by repeated AI-AI interactions. Despite AI agents' advanced capabilities, empirical studies reveal that such interactions often fail to stably induce a strategic equilibrium, such as a Nash equilibrium. Post-training methods have been proposed to induce a strategic equilibrium; however, it remains impractical to uniformly apply an alignment method across diverse, independently developed AI models in strategic settings. In this paper, we provide theoretical and empirical evidence that off-the-shelf reasoning AI agents can achieve Nash-like play zero-shot, without explicit post-training. Specifically, we prove that `reasonably reasoning' agents, i.e., agents capable of forming beliefs about others' strategies from previous observation and learning to best respond to these beliefs, eventually behave along almost every realized play path in a way that is weakly close to a Nash equilibrium of the continuation game. In addition, we relax the common-knowledge payoff assumption by allowing stage payoffs to be unknown and by having each agent observe only its own privately realized stochastic payoffs, and we show that we can still achieve the same on-path Nash convergence guarantee. We then empirically validate the proposed theories by simulating five game scenarios, ranging from a repeated prisoner's dilemma game to stylized repeated marketing promotion games. Our findings suggest that AI agents naturally exhibit such reasoning patterns and therefore attain stable equilibrium behaviors intrinsically, obviating the need for universal alignment procedures in many real-world strategic interactions.
2603.18563.paper_summary_zh: AI 代理人越來越多地被部署在以重複 AI-AI 互動為特徵的互動經濟環境中。儘管 AI 代理人擁有先進的能力，實證研究顯示這種互動往往無法穩定地誘導出戰略均衡，例如納什均衡。已提出後訓練方法以誘導戰略均衡；然而，在戰略環境中，對於多樣化且獨立開發的 AI 模型，均勻應用對齊方法仍然不切實際。在本文中，我們提供理論和實證證據，表明現成的推理 AI 代理人可以在無需明確後訓練的情況下實現類納什的零-shot 表現。具體而言，我們證明了“合理推理”的代理人，即能夠根據先前觀察形成對他人策略的信念並學習最佳回應這些信念的代理人，最終在幾乎所有實現的遊戲路徑上表現出與延續遊戲的納什均衡弱接近的行為。此外，我們通過允許階段收益未知並讓每個代理人僅觀察自己私下實現的隨機收益，放寬了共同知識收益的假設，並顯示我們仍然可以實現相同的路徑納什收斂保證。然後，我們通過模擬五個遊戲場景來實證驗證所提出的理論，這些場景從重複的囚徒困境遊戲到風格化的重複市場推廣遊戲不等。我們的研究結果表明，AI 代理人自然展現出這種推理模式，因此在許多現實世界的戰略互動中內在地達到穩定的均衡行為，從而消除了對普遍對齊程序的需求。
2603.18563.author: Enoch Hyunwook Kang et.al.
